name: Cutlass Potato Soup
recipeIngredient: 3 Medium-large boiling potatoes, peeled and chopped
2 tablespoons Cornstarch dissolved in 1/2 cup cold water
recipeInstructions:
1. Fry bacon in a heavy large saucepan over medium-high heat until crisp. Remove with a slotted spoon; drain on paper towels.
2. Crumble the bacon and set aside.
3. Pour off the drippings.
4. Melt butter in the same pan over medium heat.
5. Add the vegetables and cook until slightly softened, stirring occasionally, about 15 minutes.
6. Add the crumbled bacon, water, salt, and pepper. Cover and simmer until the vegetables are tender, about 20 minutes.
7. Add milk and heat through.
8. Stir in the dissolved cornstarch and cook until the soup thickens, about 5 minutes.
9. Serve immediately.
